# CRACKWATCH Design System — "Sovereign Intelligence"
## Generated by Google Stitch

### Creative North Star
**Technocratic Elegance** — NASA's precision meets Indian Smart City.
Authoritative data density with editorial breathing room.
**Intentional asymmetry**: large aggressive numerical readouts balanced by dense microscopic metadata.

---

## Colors

| Token | Hex | Role |
|-------|-----|------|
| `background` / `surface` | `#131315` | Base layer, deep void |
| `surface-container-low` | `#1c1b1d` | Data modules |
| `surface-container` | `#201f22` | Mid containers |
| `surface-container-high` | `#2a2a2c` | Elevated panels |
| `surface-container-highest` | `#353437` | Input fields, top layer |
| `surface-container-lowest` | `#0e0e10` | Nested telemetry |
| `on-surface` | `#e5e1e4` | Primary text |
| `on-surface-variant` | `#bbcabf` | Secondary text |
| `outline-variant` | `#3c4a42` | Ghost borders (15% opacity) |
| `primary` | `#4edea3` | Emerald — optimal status, CTAs |
| `primary-container` | `#10b981` | Emerald dark — gradient end |
| `secondary` | `#5de6ff` | Cyan — AI insights, projections |
| `tertiary` | `#ffb95f` | Amber — warnings |
| `error` | `#ffb4ab` | Red — critical alerts |
| `error-container` | `#93000a` | Deep red — error backgrounds |

### Surface Philosophy: "No-Line Rule"
- **NO opaque borders** for layout sectioning
- Use **tonal shifts** (surface layers) for separation
- Use **negative space** for implicit regions
- Ghost borders: `outline-variant` at **15% opacity** only when necessary

### Gradients
- **Power Gradient**: `primary` (#4edea3) → `primary-container` (#10b981) at 135°
- **Glassmorphism**: `surface-variant` at 40% opacity + 20px backdrop-blur

---

## Typography

### Dual-Font Strategy
- **Headlines**: Space Grotesk (geometric, futuristic)
- **Body**: Inter (data density workhorse)

| Level | Font | Size | Weight | Use |
|-------|------|------|--------|-----|
| Display-LG | Space Grotesk | 3.5rem | ExtraBold | Critical KPIs |
| Headline-MD | Space Grotesk | 1.75rem | Bold | Section titles |
| Label-MD | Inter | 0.75rem | Bold / ALL-CAPS | Metadata tags |
| Body-SM | Inter | 0.75rem | Regular | Descriptions, logs |

**Rule: Never center-align typography. Use hard left or right alignment.**

---

## Elevation & Depth

- Base: `surface` (#131315)
- Data Modules: `surface-container-low` (#1c1b1d)
- Nested: `surface-container-lowest` (#0e0e10)
- Floating: 24px blur, 8% opacity ambient shadow
- Ghost borders: `outline-variant` at 15% opacity

---

## Components

### Buttons
- **Primary**: Gradient fill (primary → primary-container), black text, 0.375rem radius
- **Secondary**: Ghost border with cyan text, no fill

### Status Indicators
- **Critical**: `error` (#ffb4ab) with 4px outer glow
- **Optimal**: `primary` (#4edea3)
- **Warning**: `tertiary` (#ffb95f)

### Telemetry Cards
- Background: `surface-container-low`, NO border
- Title: label-sm in emerald
- Number: display-md in bold

### Status Chips
- Pill-shaped, `surface-variant` bg, leading color dot, no border

---

## Do's and Don'ts

### Do
- Large numerical data as primary visual anchor
- "Technographic Asymmetry" — large chart next to dense text
- Backdrop-blur for overlays
- Cyan for AI insight data

### Don't
- No opaque borders for sections
- No "Web Blue" — emerald/cyan spectrum only
- No rounded corners beyond 0.75rem
- No standard drop shadows — use background color shifts
